```{r}
    results_models[[paste0("Top", n_genes, "_", model_name)]] <- fit
  }
}

# ---- NOW EXTRACT ROC CURVES ----

roc_list <- list()

for (name in names(results_models)) {
  fit <- results_models[[name]]
  preds <- fit$pred
  
  # Sometimes multiple resamples: choose best tuning parameter if needed
  if ("mtry" %in% names(preds)) {
    best_mtry <- fit$bestTune$mtry
    preds <- preds[preds$mtry == best_mtry, ]
  }
  if ("C" %in% names(preds)) { # for SVM
    best_C <- fit$bestTune$C
    preds <- preds[preds$C == best_C, ]
  }
  if ("k" %in% names(preds)) { # for kNN
    best_k <- fit$bestTune$k
    preds <- preds[preds$k == best_k, ]
  }
  
  # Compute ROC
  roc_obj <- roc(preds$obs, preds$Asthma, levels = c("Control", "Asthma"))
  roc_list[[name]] <- roc_obj
}

# ---- PLOT ROC CURVES ----
ggroc(roc_list, legacy.axes = TRUE) +
  ggtitle("ROC Curves for All Models (5-Fold CV)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "False Positive Rate", y = "True Positive Rate")


```

```{r}
rf_fit <- readRDS("rf_model_top20_genes.rds")

# Extract predictions from cross-validation
preds <- rf_fit$pred

# If tuning (e.g., mtry) was used, select predictions from the best hyperparameter
if ("mtry" %in% names(preds)) {
  preds <- preds[preds$mtry == rf_fit$bestTune$mtry, ]
}

```

```{r}
library(caret)

# Create confusion matrix
conf_mat <- confusionMatrix(preds$pred, preds$obs, positive = "Asthma")
print(conf_mat)

```

```{r}
library(pROC)

# Use predicted probabilities for ROC
roc_obj <- roc(preds$obs, preds$Asthma, levels = c("Control", "Asthma"))

# Plot ROC curve
plot(roc_obj, col = "blue", lwd = 2, main = "ROC Curve for RF (Top 20 DE Genes)")
auc_val <- auc(roc_obj)
cat("AUC:", round(auc_val, 3), "\n")

```

# Model 2
NOTE THAT THIS IS WHAT THE RIGHT EXPR MATRIXES ARE CALLED
datasets <- list(
  GSE40732 = expr_matrix_40732,
  GSE67472 = expr_matrix_67472,
  GSE143303 = expr_matrix_gse143303_cleaned,
  GSE40888 = expr_matrix_40888_clean,
  GSE64913 = expr_matrix_64913_clean
)

```{r}
length(common_genes_all)
```


```{r}
BiocManager::install("sva")
```


```{r}
# Load required packages
library(sva)
library(limma)
library(caret)

# ---- 1. Create Labels ----
# Dataset: GSE40732
labels_40732 <- ifelse(grepl("subtype: non", pheno_data_40732$characteristics_ch1.1), "healthy",
                 ifelse(grepl("subtype: reversible|subtype: PC20", pheno_data_40732$characteristics_ch1.1), "moderate", "severe"))

# Dataset: GSE67472
labels_67472 <- ifelse(pheno_data_67472$`disease state:ch1` == "asthma", "moderate", "healthy")

# Dataset: GSE143303
labels_143303 <- ifelse(grepl("Severe asthma", pheno_data_143303$characteristics_ch1.1), "severe", "healthy")

# Dataset: GSE64913
labels_64913 <- ifelse(grepl("Severe Asthmatic", pheno_data_64913$characteristics_ch1.1), "severe", "healthy")

# ---- 2. Combine Expression and Labels ----
common_genes_all <- Reduce(intersect, list(
  rownames(expr_matrix_64913_clean),
  rownames(expr_matrix_40732),
  rownames(expr_matrix_gse143303_cleaned),
  rownames(expr_matrix_67472)
))

# Expression matrix
raw_expr_matrix <- cbind(
  expr_matrix_64913_clean[common_genes_all, ],
  expr_matrix_40732[common_genes_all, ],
  expr_matrix_gse143303_cleaned[common_genes_all, ],
  expr_matrix_67472[common_genes_all, ]
)

# Labels
combined_labels <- c(labels_64913, labels_40732, labels_143303, labels_67472)
```

```{r}
pca_67472 <- prcomp(t(expr_matrix_67472[common_genes_all, ]), scale. = TRUE)
pc1_67472 <- pca_67472$x[, 1]

# Sub-batch labels
sub_batch_67472 <- ifelse(pc1_67472 >= 0, "batch1_67472", "batch2_67472")
```


```{r}
# Batch labels
batch_labels <- c(
  rep("GSE64913", ncol(expr_matrix_64913_clean)),
  rep("GSE40732", ncol(expr_matrix_40732)),
  rep("GSE143303", ncol(expr_matrix_gse143303_cleaned)),
  sub_batch_67472
)

# ---- 3. Apply ComBat with Mod Matrix ----
mod <- model.matrix(~ combined_labels)
combat_corrected_expr <- ComBat(dat = raw_expr_matrix, batch = batch_labels, mod = mod, par.prior = TRUE)

# ---- 4. Drop Healthy Samples ----
non_healthy_idx <- which(combined_labels != "healthy")
expr_non_healthy <- combat_corrected_expr[, non_healthy_idx]
labels_non_healthy <- combined_labels[non_healthy_idx]

# ---- 5. Differential Expression (Moderate vs Severe) ----
design <- model.matrix(~ 0 + factor(labels_non_healthy))
colnames(design) <- levels(factor(labels_non_healthy))
fit <- lmFit(expr_non_healthy, design)
contrast_matrix <- makeContrasts(severe - moderate, levels=design)
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast_matrix)
fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)
top_genes_df <- topTable(fit2, adjust="fdr", number=Inf)
```

```{r}
# pca on unmerged data (coloured by condition)
pca_unmerged <- prcomp(t(raw_expr_matrix), scale. = TRUE)
pca_df_unmerged <- data.frame(
  PC1 = pca_unmerged$x[,1],
  PC2 = pca_unmerged$x[,2],
  Condition = combined_labels
)

ggplot(pca_df_unmerged, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Condition)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "PCA of Unmerged Data", x = "PC1", y = "PC2")
```
```{r}
# PCA on combat merged data (batch corrected)
pca_combat <- prcomp(t(combat_corrected_expr), scale. = TRUE)
pca_df_combat <- data.frame(
  PC1 = pca_combat$x[,1],
  PC2 = pca_combat$x[,2],
  Condition = combined_labels,
  Batch = batch_labels
)

# Plot 2: PCA of corrected data, colored by condition
ggplot(pca_df_combat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Condition)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "PCA of ComBat-Corrected Data (by Condition)", x = "PC1", y = "PC2")

```

```{r}
# PCA of merged data, coloured by batch
ggplot(pca_df_combat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Batch)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "PCA of ComBat-Corrected Data (by Dataset)", x = "PC1", y = "PC2")

```

4 types of models (performance based on accuracy)
```{r}
set.seed(123)

# Store results
all_results <- data.frame()

# List of top N genes
for (n in c(2, 5, 10, 20)) {
  top_genes <- rownames(top_genes_df)[1:n]
  expr_subset <- t(expr_non_healthy[top_genes, ])
  
  df <- data.frame(expr_subset, label = factor(labels_non_healthy, levels = c("moderate", "severe")))
  
  # Set up CV
  ctrl <- trainControl(method = "cv", number = 5, savePredictions = TRUE)
  
  # Models to train
  models <- c("glm", "svmRadial", "rf", "knn")
  
  for (model in models) {
    fit <- train(label ~ ., data = df, method = model, trControl = ctrl)
    
    # Extract accuracy for each fold
    accs <- fit$resample$Accuracy
    
    # Store results in long format
    all_results <- rbind(all_results, data.frame(
      Accuracy = accs,
      Model = model,
      TopGenes = paste0("Top_", n)
    ))
  }
}

```

```{r}
all_results <- all_results %>%
  mutate(
    GeneModel = paste(TopGenes, Model, sep = "_"),
    Model = factor(Model, levels = c("glm", "knn", "rf", "svmRadial")),
    TopGenes = factor(TopGenes, levels = c("Top_2", "Top_5", "Top_10", "Top_20"))
  )

simplified_labels <- rep(c("GLM", "KNN", "RF", "SVM"), times = length(levels(all_results$TopGenes)))


# Order the new x-axis factor so the gene sets are grouped, and within them, model order is preserved
gene_model_levels <- c()
for (g in levels(all_results$TopGenes)) {
  for (m in levels(all_results$Model)) {
    gene_model_levels <- c(gene_model_levels, paste(g, m, sep = "_"))
  }
}
all_results$GeneModel <- factor(all_results$GeneModel, levels = gene_model_levels)

# Step 2: Plot with x = GeneModel
ggplot(all_results, aes(x = GeneModel, y = Accuracy, color = TopGenes)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = NA, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8, position = position_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = simplified_labels) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Secondary Model Accuracy for Top 2-20 DE Genes",
    x = "Model",
    y = "Accuracy",
    color = "Gene Set"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


```
4 model types (performance based on precision)

```{r}
install.packages("yardstick")
```


```{r}
library(caret)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(yardstick)

set.seed(123)

# Custom summary function to compute precision
precision_summary <- function(data, lev = NULL, model = NULL) {
  precision_val <- precision_vec(truth = data$obs, estimate = data$pred, event_level = "second")
  out <- c(Precision = precision_val)
  return(out)
}

# Store results
all_results <- data.frame()

# List of top N genes
for (n in c(2, 5, 10, 20)) {
  top_genes <- rownames(top_genes_df)[1:n]
  expr_subset <- t(expr_non_healthy[top_genes, ])
  
  df <- data.frame(expr_subset, label = factor(labels_non_healthy, levels = c("moderate", "severe")))
  
  # CV with precision as metric
  ctrl <- trainControl(
    method = "cv",
    number = 5,
    savePredictions = TRUE,
    classProbs = FALSE,
    summaryFunction = precision_summary
  )
  
  models <- c("glm", "svmRadial", "rf", "knn")
  
  for (model in models) {
    fit <- train(label ~ ., data = df, method = model, metric = "Precision", trControl = ctrl)
    
    # Extract precision values
    precisions <- fit$resample$Precision
    
    # Store results
    all_results <- rbind(all_results, data.frame(
      Precision = precisions,
      Model = model,
      TopGenes = paste0("Top_", n)
    ))
  }
}

# Organize labels and factors for plotting
all_results <- all_results %>%
  mutate(
    GeneModel = paste(TopGenes, Model, sep = "_"),
    Model = factor(Model, levels = c("glm", "knn", "rf", "svmRadial")),
    TopGenes = factor(TopGenes, levels = c("Top_2", "Top_5", "Top_10", "Top_20"))
  )

# Simplified model labels (repeated pattern)
simplified_labels <- rep(c("GLM", "KNN", "RF", "SVM"), times = length(levels(all_results$TopGenes)))

# Preserve grouping and order for x-axis
gene_model_levels <- c()
for (g in levels(all_results$TopGenes)) {
  for (m in levels(all_results$Model)) {
    gene_model_levels <- c(gene_model_levels, paste(g, m, sep = "_"))
  }
}
all_results$GeneModel <- factor(all_results$GeneModel, levels = gene_model_levels)

# Precision plot
ggplot(all_results, aes(x = GeneModel, y = Precision, color = TopGenes)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = NA, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8, position = position_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = simplified_labels) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Secondary Model Precision with Top 2-100 DE Genes",
    x = "Model",
    y = "Precision",
    color = "Gene Set"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

```



## 1-step model comparison

```{r}
set.seed(123)

# Custom summary function to return both Accuracy and macro-averaged Precision
multi_class_metrics <- function(data, lev = NULL, model = NULL) {
  acc <- yardstick::accuracy_vec(data$obs, data$pred)
  
  # Average precision across all classes (macro average)
  precision_per_class <- data %>%
    yardstick::precision(truth = obs, estimate = pred) %>%
    dplyr::pull(.estimate)
  
  macro_precision <- mean(precision_per_class)
  
  c(Accuracy = acc, Precision = macro_precision)
}

# Storage
all_results_1step <- data.frame()

# Top 5 genes
top_genes_5 <- rownames(top_genes_df)[1:5]
expr_subset_1step <- t(combat_corrected_expr[top_genes_5, ])
df_1step <- data.frame(expr_subset_1step, label = factor(combined_labels, levels = c("healthy", "moderate", "severe")))

# Cross-validation
ctrl_1step <- trainControl(
  method = "cv",
  number = 5,
  savePredictions = TRUE,
  classProbs = FALSE,
  summaryFunction = multi_class_metrics
)

models <- c("svmRadial", "rf", "knn")

# Train models and collect metrics
for (model in models) {
  fit <- train(label ~ ., data = df_1step, method = model, metric = "Accuracy", trControl = ctrl_1step)
  
  accs <- fit$resample$Accuracy
  precs <- fit$resample$Precision
  
  all_results_1step <- rbind(all_results_1step, data.frame(
    Accuracy = accs,
    Precision = precs,
    Model = model
  ))
}

```

```{r}
# Boxplot to compare the accuracy of different models
ggplot(all_results_1step, aes(x = Model, y = Accuracy, fill = Model)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Model Accuracy Comparison (5-Fold CV)",
    x = "Model Type",
    y = "Accuracy (5-fold CV)"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("svmRadial" = "lightblue", "rf" = "lightgreen", "knn" = "lightcoral")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
```{r}
ggplot(all_results_1step, aes(x = Model, y = Precision, fill = Model)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Model Precision Comparison (Macro Avg, 5-Fold CV)",
    x = "Model Type",
    y = "Macro-Averaged Precision"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("svmRadial" = "lightblue", "rf" = "lightgreen", "knn" = "lightcoral")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

```
```{r}
all_results_1step %>%
  group_by(Model) %>%
  summarise(
    MeanAccuracy = mean(Accuracy),
    MeanPrecision = mean(Precision)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(MeanPrecision))

```


## 2-step model comparative accuracy

```{r}
# Set the labels for binary classification: "asthma" vs "healthy"
binary_labels <- ifelse(combined_labels != "healthy", "asthma", "healthy")

# Subset the expression data for the top 10 genes
top_genes_10 <- rownames(top_genes_df)[1:10]
expr_subset_10 <- t(combat_corrected_expr[top_genes_10, ])

# Create a data frame with the expression data and binary labels
df_binary_2step <- data.frame(expr_subset_10, label = factor(binary_labels, levels = c("healthy", "asthma")))
```

```{r}
# Set up cross-validation (5-fold CV)
ctrl_binary <- trainControl(method = "cv", number = 5, savePredictions = TRUE)

# Train the logistic regression model
logit_model <- train(label ~ ., data = df_binary_2step, method = "svmRadial", trControl = ctrl_binary)

# Print the model results
cat("Logistic Regression Model Accuracy (Asthma vs Healthy): ", logit_model$results$Accuracy, "\n")
```

```{r}
# --- STEP 1: Get top genes and prepare data for step 1 (healthy vs asthma) ---
top_genes_step1 <- rownames(top_genes_df)[1:20]
expr_step1 <- t(combat_corrected_expr[top_genes_step1, ])
binary_labels <- ifelse(combined_labels == "healthy", "healthy", "asthma")
df_step1 <- data.frame(expr_step1, label = factor(binary_labels, levels = c("healthy", "asthma")))

# Train final Step 1 model: RF
set.seed(123)
step1_model <- train(
  label ~ ., data = df_step1,
  method = "rf",
  trControl = trainControl(method = "none")  # train on full data
)

# --- STEP 2: Get top genes and prepare data for step 2 (moderate vs severe) ---
top_genes_step2 <- rownames(top_genes_df)[1:5]  # top 5 DE genes for moderate vs severe
expr_step2 <- t(expr_non_healthy[top_genes_step2, ])
df_step2 <- data.frame(expr_step2, label = factor(labels_non_healthy, levels = c("moderate", "severe")))

# Train final Step 2 model: kNN
set.seed(123)
step2_model <- train(
  label ~ ., data = df_step2,
  method = "knn",
  trControl = trainControl(method = "none")
)

# --- STEP 3: Make predictions ---
# Predict Step 1 (asthma vs healthy)
pred_step1 <- predict(step1_model, newdata = df_step1)

# Prepare Step 2 data: only predict moderate/severe if Step 1 says "asthma"
step2_input <- combat_corrected_expr[top_genes_step2, pred_step1 == "asthma", drop = FALSE]
step2_input <- t(step2_input)
step2_input_df <- data.frame(step2_input)

# Predict Step 2 (moderate vs severe)
pred_step2 <- predict(step2_model, newdata = step2_input_df)

# --- STEP 4: Combine Step 1 and Step 2 predictions ---
# Construct final prediction: if step 1 == healthy, predict "healthy", otherwise use step 2
final_preds <- rep(NA, length(pred_step1))
final_preds[pred_step1 == "healthy"] <- "healthy"
final_preds[pred_step1 == "asthma"] <- as.character(pred_step2)

# --- STEP 5: Compare to true labels ---
# True labels are in combined_labels
final_preds <- factor(final_preds, levels = c("healthy", "moderate", "severe"))
true_labels <- factor(combined_labels, levels = c("healthy", "moderate", "severe"))

# Compute overall accuracy
overall_accuracy <- mean(final_preds == true_labels)
cat("Overall 2-Step Model Accuracy:", overall_accuracy, "\n")

# Optional: confusion matrix
confusionMatrix(final_preds, true_labels)

```

```{r}
library(caret)
library(dplyr)

set.seed(123)
num_splits <- 5
accuracies <- numeric(num_splits)

# Prepare true class labels
true_labels_all <- factor(combined_labels, levels = c("healthy", "moderate", "severe"))

# Create binary asthma/healthy labels for step 1
binary_labels_all <- ifelse(combined_labels == "healthy", "healthy", "asthma")

# Loop through 5 random splits
for (i in 1:num_splits) {
  cat("Running split", i, "...\n")
  
  # Create train/test indices
  train_idx <- createDataPartition(true_labels_all, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
  test_idx <- setdiff(seq_along(true_labels_all), train_idx)
  
  # --- STEP 1: Train RF model for asthma vs healthy ---
  expr_step1_train <- t(combat_corrected_expr[top_genes_step1, train_idx])
  df_step1_train <- data.frame(expr_step1_train,
                               label = factor(binary_labels_all[train_idx], levels = c("healthy", "asthma")))
  
  step1_model <- train(
    label ~ ., data = df_step1_train,
    method = "rf",
    trControl = trainControl(method = "none")
  )
  
  # --- STEP 2: Train kNN model for moderate vs severe ---
  # Only train on non-healthy samples in the training set
  non_healthy_train_idx <- train_idx[which(combined_labels[train_idx] != "healthy")]
  expr_step2_train <- t(combat_corrected_expr[top_genes_step2, non_healthy_train_idx])
  df_step2_train <- data.frame(expr_step2_train,
                               label = factor(combined_labels[non_healthy_train_idx],
                                              levels = c("moderate", "severe")))
  
  step2_model <- train(
    label ~ ., data = df_step2_train,
    method = "knn",
    trControl = trainControl(method = "none")
  )
  
  # --- STEP 3: Apply to test data ---
  # Step 1 prediction
  expr_step1_test <- t(combat_corrected_expr[top_genes_step1, test_idx])
  df_step1_test <- data.frame(expr_step1_test)
  pred_step1 <- predict(step1_model, newdata = df_step1_test)
  
  # Step 2: Only apply to test samples predicted as asthma
  asthma_test_idx <- test_idx[which(pred_step1 == "asthma")]
  
  if (length(asthma_test_idx) > 0) {
    expr_step2_test <- t(combat_corrected_expr[top_genes_step2, asthma_test_idx])
    df_step2_test <- data.frame(expr_step2_test)
    pred_step2 <- predict(step2_model, newdata = df_step2_test)
  } else {
    pred_step2 <- character(0)
  }
  
  # --- STEP 4: Final combined prediction ---
  final_preds <- character(length(test_idx))
  final_preds[pred_step1 == "healthy"] <- "healthy"
  final_preds[pred_step1 == "asthma"] <- as.character(pred_step2)
  
  # Final true labels
  true_test_labels <- combined_labels[test_idx]
  
  # --- STEP 5: Accuracy ---
  final_preds <- factor(final_preds, levels = c("healthy", "moderate", "severe"))
  true_test_labels <- factor(true_test_labels, levels = c("healthy", "moderate", "severe"))
  
  acc <- mean(final_preds == true_test_labels)
  accuracies[i] <- acc
}

# Final output
cat("Average Overall 2-Step Model Accuracy across", num_splits, "splits:", round(mean(accuracies), 4), "\n")

```
```{r}
set.seed(2)
num_splits <- 5
accuracies <- numeric(num_splits)
precisions <- numeric(num_splits)

# Prepare full labels
true_labels_all <- factor(combined_labels, levels = c("healthy", "moderate", "severe"))
binary_labels_all <- ifelse(combined_labels == "healthy", "healthy", "asthma")

for (i in 1:num_splits) {
  cat("Running split", i, "...\n")
  
  # Split
  train_idx <- createDataPartition(true_labels_all, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
  test_idx <- setdiff(seq_along(true_labels_all), train_idx)
  
  # --- STEP 1: Train RF model (healthy vs asthma) ---
  expr_step1_train <- t(combat_corrected_expr[top_genes_step1, train_idx])
  df_step1_train <- data.frame(expr_step1_train,
                               label = factor(binary_labels_all[train_idx], levels = c("healthy", "asthma")))
  
  step1_model <- train(label ~ ., data = df_step1_train, method = "rf",
                       trControl = trainControl(method = "none"))
  
  # --- STEP 2: Train kNN model (moderate vs severe) ---
  non_healthy_train_idx <- train_idx[which(combined_labels[train_idx] != "healthy")]
  expr_step2_train <- t(combat_corrected_expr[top_genes_step2, non_healthy_train_idx])
  df_step2_train <- data.frame(expr_step2_train,
                               label = factor(combined_labels[non_healthy_train_idx],
                                              levels = c("moderate", "severe")))
  
  step2_model <- train(label ~ ., data = df_step2_train, method = "knn",
                       trControl = trainControl(method = "none"))
  
  # --- STEP 3: Predict on test set ---
  expr_step1_test <- t(combat_corrected_expr[top_genes_step1, test_idx])
  df_step1_test <- data.frame(expr_step1_test)
  pred_step1 <- predict(step1_model, newdata = df_step1_test)
  
  asthma_test_idx <- test_idx[which(pred_step1 == "asthma")]
  if (length(asthma_test_idx) > 0) {
    expr_step2_test <- t(combat_corrected_expr[top_genes_step2, asthma_test_idx])
    df_step2_test <- data.frame(expr_step2_test)
    pred_step2 <- predict(step2_model, newdata = df_step2_test)
  } else {
    pred_step2 <- character(0)
  }
  
  # --- STEP 4: Final prediction ---
  final_preds <- character(length(test_idx))
  final_preds[pred_step1 == "healthy"] <- "healthy"
  final_preds[pred_step1 == "asthma"] <- as.character(pred_step2)
  
  true_test_labels <- combined_labels[test_idx]
  
  # Format factors
  final_preds <- factor(final_preds, levels = c("healthy", "moderate", "severe"))
  true_test_labels <- factor(true_test_labels, levels = c("healthy", "moderate", "severe"))
  
  # --- STEP 5: Accuracy and Precision ---
  acc <- mean(final_preds == true_test_labels)
  accuracies[i] <- acc
  
  # Use yardstick for macro-averaged precision
  prec_tbl <- data.frame(truth = true_test_labels, prediction = final_preds)
  prec_result <- yardstick::precision(prec_tbl, truth = truth, estimate = prediction, estimator = "macro")
  precisions[i] <- prec_result$.estimate
}

# --- FINAL RESULTS ---
cat("Average 2-Step Model Accuracy over", num_splits, "splits:", round(mean(accuracies), 4), "\n")
cat("Average Macro-Averaged Precision over", num_splits, "splits:", round(mean(precisions), 4), "\n")

```



## Final kNN Secondary Model and RDS for Shiny

```{r}
set.seed(123)

# Select top 5 genes
top5_genes <- rownames(top_genes_df)[1:5]
expr_top5 <- t(expr_non_healthy[top5_genes, ])

df_final <- data.frame(expr_top5, label = factor(labels_non_healthy, levels = c("moderate", "severe")))

final_knn_model <- train(
  label ~ .,
  data = df_final,
  method = "knn",
  trControl = trainControl(method = "none")
)
```

RDS stuff

```{r}
saveRDS(combat_corrected_expr, file = "frozen_combat_corrected_expr_secondary_model.rds")

# --- 2. Save list of top DE genes for both steps ---
top_genes_secondary <- rownames(top_genes_df)[1:5] 
top_genes_secondary

saveRDS(top_genes_secondary, file = "top_de_genes_list_secondary.rds")

# --- 3. Save final kNN model for moderate vs severe ---
saveRDS(final_knn_model, file = "final_secondary_model.rds")

# Add gene names as a column



```

```{r}
combat_expr_export <- data.frame(Gene = rownames(expr_non_healthy), expr_non_healthy)
write.csv(combat_expr_export, file = "combat_combined_expression_matrix_secondary_model.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}
expr_non_healthy_raw <- raw_expr_matrix[, non_healthy_idx]

raw_expr_export <- data.frame(Gene = rownames(expr_non_healthy_raw), expr_non_healthy_raw)
write.csv(raw_expr_export, file = "raw_combined_expression_matrix_secondary_model.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
